sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68530" key="monoei/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-είμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (εἷμἀ</foreign> <sense id="n68530.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μονοχίτων</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
